title: British Agent
writer: R.H. Bruce Lockhart, Laird Doyle, Pierre Collings
actors: Leslie Howard, Kay Francis, William Gargan
plot: It's 1917. In Russia, the Communist revolution is in full swing. Stephen 'Steve' Locke is a British agent in Russia. The main task of Steve is to prevent the Bolsheviks, led by Joseph Stalin, to sign in Petrograd a separate treaty...
